CustomField.formula:
IF( Is_Clubhouse_Charges__c, Booking__r.Clubhouse_Charges__c, IF(Is_Infrastructure_Charges__c, Booking__r.Total_Infrastructure_Charges__c, IF(Is_Maintenance_Charges__c, Booking__r.Total_Maintenance_Amount__c, IF( Booking__r.RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Plots', Payment_percent__c * Quote__r.GRAND_TOTAL__c, (Booking__r.Agreement_Value__c - Booking__r.Total_Infrastructure_Charges__c) * Payment_percent__c)))
)
CustomField.label: AmountB
